creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Paul Floyd from comment #1)
FreeBSD 14/stable @amd64.
valgrind-3.22.0_1,1, all from sources.

Fell free use example code as you want, you also may drop license.
If you want be 100% license clear than license should be same as libdrm: xf86drm.c, since code copy-pasted with changes. :)

Also current version of stable valgrind miss syscalls, like new kcmp().


Thanks for your support!
